markdownRemark.html:
Terminals Are Sexy

A curated list of Terminal frameworks, plugins & resources for CLI lovers.

Check out my blog and follow me on Twitter.

Table of Contents

  1. Shells
    • Base Shells
    • ZSH
    • Bash
    • Git
    • Fish
  2. Terminal Emulation Applications
  3. Package Managers
    • Universal
    • macOS
    • Linux
    • Windows
  4. Text Editors
  5. Tools and Plugins
  6. Communication
  7. Other
    • Community
    • Other Sexy Lists
      • Awesome
      • Misc
    • Contributing

Shells

Sexy frameworks, plugins and resources for your sexy shell.

Base Shells

  • Ammonite-Shellstars2.4k - An object shell with a Scala-like scripting language.
  • bash - GNU Project's shell (Bourne Again SHell).
  • fish - Smart and user-friendly command line shell.
  • PowerShellstars26k - Automation and configuration tool/framework that is optimized for dealing with structured data.
  • xonsh - Python-ish, BASHwards-looking shell language and command prompt.
  • zsh - Powerful shell with scripting language.

ZSH

  • alfstars83 - Out of this world super fast and configurable framework for zsh.
  • ant-zshstars20 - Tiny and lightweight ZSH configuration environment for special customization needs.
  • antibodystars1.6k - Faster and simpler antigen written in Golang.
  • antigenstars6.5k - Plugin manager for zsh, inspired by oh-my-zsh and vundle.
  • dotzshstars189 - Community driven framework for zsh.
  • liquidpromptstars4.1k - Full-featured & carefully designed adaptive prompt for Bash & Zsh.
  • oh-my-zshstars127.5k - Delightful community-driven framework for managing your zsh configuration.
  • powerlevel9kstars13.1k - Super flexible awesome powerline ZSH theme.
  • preztostars12.1k - Configuration framework for Zsh.
  • pumicestars7 - Lightweight plugin manager for zsh.
  • purestars10.2k - Pretty, minimal and fast ZSH prompt.
  • slimzshstars507 - Small, usable configuration for ZSH.
  • zeeshstars38 - Cross-platform Zsh framework.
  • zgenstars1.3k - Lightweight and simple plugin manager for ZSH.
  • zilshstars29 - Zsh config system that aims to appeal more to power-users and follow the simplistic approach of vim-pathogen.
  • zimstars2k - Zsh configuration framework with blazing speed and modular extensions.
  • zinitstars2.2k - Flexible Zsh plugin manager with clean fpath, reports, completion management, turbo mode, services.
  • zoppostars29 - Crippled configuration framework for Zsh.
  • zplugstars4.6k - Next-generation plugin manager for zsh.
  • zpmstars125 - Plugin manager for zsh similar to vim-plug.
  • zsh-autosuggestionsstars17.2k - Fish-like autosuggestions for zsh.
  • zsh-ponystars150 - Covers customizing ZSH without a framework.
  • zsh-quickstart-kitstars382 - Simple zsh quickstart for using zsh and zgen.
  • zsh-syntax-highlightingstars11.8k - Fish shell like syntax highlighting for Zsh.
  • zshdbstars214 - ZSH debugger.
  • ztaneshstars266 - Aims to improve your UNIX command line experience and productivity with the the configuration provided by the ztanesh project.
  • zulustars130 - Total environment manager for ZSH 5+.
  • zunitstars140 - Powerful unit testing framework for ZSH.

Bash

  • aliasesstars395 - Contextual, dynamic, organized aliases for the bash shell.
  • bash-itstars12.3k - Collection of community Bash commands and scripts.
  • bash-powerlinestars799 - Powerline-style Bash prompt in pure Bash script.
  • bash-sensiblestars1.8k - Attempt at saner Bash defaults.
  • bashtrapstars1.6k - Quick way to spruce up OSX terminal.
  • hstrstars2.7k - Bash History Suggest Box.
  • liquidpromptstars4.1k - Full-featured & carefully designed adaptive prompt for Bash & Zsh.

Git

  • bash-git-promptstars6k - Informative and fancy Bash prompt for Git users.
  • git-extra-commandsstars644 - Collection of useful extra commands for git
  • git-promptstars328 - Bash prompt with Git, SVN and HG modules.
  • git-radarstars2.6k - Heads up display for git
  • git-shstars716 - Customized Bash environment suitable for Git work.
  • gittifystars56 - Colorful Bash prompt + customized Git aliases.
  • oh-my-gitstars3.4k - Opinionated git prompt for bash and zsh.
  • sexy-bash-promptstars1.1k - Bash prompt with colors, Git statuses, and Git branches.

Fish

  • Fisherstars4.9k - Package manager for the fish shell.
  • oh-my-fishstars7.3k - The Fishshell Framework.

⬆ back to top

Terminal Emulation Applications

Sexy 3rd party terminal emulation applications.

  • Alacrittystars32k - Cross-platform, GPU-accelerated terminal emulator.
  • Cmderstars22.5k - Lovely console emulator package for Windows.
  • ConEmustars7.3k - Customizable Windows terminal with tabs, splits, quake-style and more.
  • ConsoleZstars2.9k - Windows console window enhancement. It is a fork of Console project.
  • FluentTerminalstars7.8k - A Terminal Emulator based on UWP and web technologies.
  • GNOME Terminal - Terminal emulator for GNOME.
  • GNU Screen - Full-screen window manager that multiplexes a physical terminal between several processes.
  • Go2Shell - Opens a terminal window to the current directory in Finder.
  • Hyperstars35.8k - Terminal built on web technologies.
  • iTerm2stars11.1k - Terminal emulator for macOS that does amazing things.
  • KiTTY - Fork from version 0.70 of PuTTY, the best telnet / SSH client in the world.
  • Konsole - Terminal emulator for the K Desktop Environment.
  • MacTerm - Powerful replacement for macOS Terminal.
  • Moshstars10k - Remote terminal application that allows roaming and supports intermittent connectivity.
  • PuTTY - SSH and telnet client, developed originally by Simon Tatham for the Windows platform.
  • Terminatorstars736 - Multiple GNOME terminals in one window.
  • Terminologystars451 - The best terminal emulator based on the Enlightenment Foundation Libraries.
  • Terminusstars17.7k - Cross-platform terminal for a more modern age, based on web technologies.
  • Termitestars2.9k - Keyboard-centric terminal, aimed at use within a tiling window manager.
  • Tildastars1k - Gtk based drop down terminal for Linux and Unix.
  • Tilix - Advanced GTK3 tiling terminal emulator that follows the Gnome Human Interface Guidelines.
  • Xfce Terminal - Modern terminal emulator primarily for the Xfce desktop environment.
  • xterm - Terminal emulator for the X Window System.
  • ZOC - SSH/Telnet Client and Terminal Emulator for macOS and Windows.

⬆ back to top

Package Managers

Sexy package managers for your macOS, Linux & Windows CLIs.

Universal

  • asdfstars10.7k - Extendable version manager with support for Ruby, Node.js, Elixir, Erlang & more
  • basherstars791 - Package manager for shell scripts.
  • bpkg - JavaScript has npm, Ruby has Gems, Python has pip and now Shell has bpkg.
  • composer - Composer is a package manager for PHP.
  • guix - Functional package manager for installed software packages and versions.
  • nix - Powerful package manager for Linux and other Unix systems that makes package management reliable and reproducible.
  • npmjs - Package manager for JavaScript.
  • pip - Package management system used to install and manage software packages written in Python.
  • rubygems - The Ruby community’s gem hosting service.
  • yarn - New package and dependency manager for javascript.

macOS

  • fink - Wants to bring the full world of Unix Open Source software to Darwin and macOS.
  • homebrew - Missing package manager for macOS.
  • macports - Package manager that simplifies the installation of software on the macOS and Darwin operating systems.
  • masstars8.1k - Mac App Store command line interface.

Linux

  • linuxbrew - The Homebrew package manager for Linux.
  • pkgin - Aimed at being an apt / yum like tool for managing pkgsrc binary packages.

ChromeOS

  • chromebrewstars1.7k - Package manager for Chrome OS.

Windows

  • chocolatey - Package manager for Windows.
  • cygwin - Linux-like environment for Windows making it possible to port software running on POSIX systems to Windows.
  • ninite - Install and Update All Your Programs at Once.
  • onegetstars2.3k - PackageManagement (aka OneGet) is a package manager for Windows.
  • ruckzuck - Software Package Manager for Windows, a quick way to install and update Software.
  • scoop - Package manager for Windows.
  • wpkg - Automated software deployment, upgrade and removal program for Windows.

⬆ back to top

Text Editors

Sexy text editors for your Command Line Interface.

  • emacs - Cross-platform text-editor that has both command-line and graphical user interface.
    • spacemacs - Community-driven emacs distribution.
  • jed - Freely available text editor for Unix, VMS, MSDOS, OS/2, BeOS, QNX, and win9X/NT platforms.
  • kakoune - Modal editor with multiple selections and orthogonal design.
  • microstars16.8k - Modern and intuitive terminal-based text editor.
  • nano - Text editor for Unix-like computing systems or operating environments using a command line interface.
  • slapstars6k - Sublime-like terminal-based text editor.
  • vim - Extensively configurable, cross-platform and highly efficient text editor.
    • SpaceVim - Community-driven vim distribution.
    • neovim - Literally the future of vim.
  • visstars3.6k - Highly efficient text editor.

⬆ back to top

Tools and Plugins

Sexy Applications for your Command Line Interface.

  • ack3stars345 - Greplike tool, optimized for programmers.
  • add-gitignorestars482 - An interactive CLI that generates a .gitignore for your project based on your needs.
  • asciinemastars9.2k - Terminal session recorder.
  • autojumpstars12.6k - cd command that learns
  • bcalstars335 - Storage conversion and expression calculator.
  • bukustars4.4k - command-line bookmark manager.
  • byobu - Byobu is an open source text-based window manager and terminal multiplexer.
  • cointopstars2.2k - The fastest and most interactive terminal based UI application for tracking cryptocurrencies.
  • colorlsstars3.6k - Beautify the terminal's ls command, with color and font-awesome icons.
  • ddgrstars2k - DuckDuckGo from the terminal.
  • df-showstars36 - Interactive directory and file browser with a similar feel to the ls command.
  • docklystars2.8k - Docker console UI and Dashboard for quickly managing and inspecting Containers and Services.
  • drystars2.3k - Docker manager for the terminal.
  • exastars13.2k - Replacement for 'ls' written in Rust.
  • fselectstars2.9k - 'find' replacement with SQL-like syntax.
  • fxstars10.7k - Command-line JSON viewer.
  • fzfstars36.6k - Command-line fuzzy finder.
  • gcalclistars2.5k - Google Calendar command line interface.
  • getnews.techstars98 - Checking the latest news headlines from various news outlets on the web.
  • glancesstars18.3k - top/htop alternative.
  • googlerstars5.1k - Search Google from your terminal.
  • haxor-newsstars3.3k - Browse Hacker News like a haxor.
  • homebrew-caskstars18.2k - CLI workflow for the administration of macOS applications distributed as binaries.
  • howdoistars8.9k - Instant code answers and examples from the command line
  • htop - Cool looking and interactive process viewer 'replacement' for the top command.
  • hub - Command-line wrapper for git that makes working with GitHub easy.
  • imgpstars773 - Multi-core batch image resizer and rotator.
  • jaymock-clistars12 - Mock an API and generate fake JSON test data, right from the terminal.
  • jq.nodestars364 - Command-line JSON/string processor, JavaScript and Lodash in your shell.
  • jrnlstars22 - Simple command line journal application that stores your journal in a plain text file.
  • kstars1.5k - Directory listings for zsh with git features.
  • kubeboxstars1.7k - Terminal console for Kubernetes.
  • lexisstars5 - word counting made easy. Retrieve the number of words in a string or stdin.
  • lfstars3.2k - Terminal file manager.
  • lolcatstars4.5k - Rainbows and unicorns!
  • lunchystars2.8k - Friendly wrapper for launchctl.
  • mps-youtubestars6.7k - Terminal based YouTube player and downloader
  • navistars9.1k - An interactive cheatsheet tool for the command-line.
  • neofetchstars11.6k - Fetches system/theme information in terminal for Linux desktop screenshots. Alternative to screenfetch.
  • nnnstars11.4k - Tiny, lightning fast, feature-packed file manager.
  • ranger - Console file manager with vi key bindings.
  • reboundstars3.5k - Command-line debugger that instantly fetches Stack Overflow results when you get a compiler error.
  • reddit terminal viewerstars4.5k - Browse Reddit from your terminal.
  • ripgrepstars25k - Code-searching tool like ack and the_silver_searcher, but faster.
  • screenfetchstars3.2k - Fetches system/theme information in terminal for Linux desktop screenshots.
  • shell2httpstars755 - HTTP-server to execute shell commands. Designed for development, prototyping or remote control.
  • streamlinkstars6.2k - CLI for extracting streams from various websites to a video player of your choosing.
  • taskell - Command-line Trello-like kanban-board/TODO lists.
  • taskwarrior - Command-line TODO list manager.
  • the_silver_searcherstars21.9k - Code-searching tool similar to ack, but faster.
  • tigstars10k - Text mode interface for git.
  • tivstars954 - Text mode terminal image viewer.
  • tldrstars32.6k - Simplified and community-driven man pages.
  • tmux - Terminal multiplexer.
  • tmuxinatorstars10.7k - Manage complex tmux sessions easily.
  • transfer.sh - Quickly upload and share files from your shell.
  • trestars167 - Improved tree command that knows git, creates shell alias for quick opening, and more!
  • vifm - Console file manager with vi key bindings and some ideas from mutt.
  • walstars695 - generate and change colorschemes on the fly.
  • whereamistars139 - Get your geolocation information from the CLI.
  • wttr.instars14.4k - The right way to check the weather.
  • yadm - Seamless git-based management of your dotfiles.
  • youtube-dl - download videos from YouTube
  • zstars13.1k - Tool to jump to folders based on history matching a given regex
  • z.luastars2k - New cd command that helps you navigate faster by learning your habits.
  • zoxidestars2.4k - cd anywhere without typing in long paths.

⬆ back to top

Communication

Sexy Tools for communicating through the Command Line Interface.

  • bitchx - Feature-rich and highly configurable, terminal based IRC client based on ircII.
  • centerim - Terminal based, multi-protocol Instant Messaging client with support for IRC.
  • epic - IRC client that has been under active development for 20+ years in 5 generations.
  • go-jirastars2.2k - Simple jira command line client in Go.
  • irssi - Self proclaimed client of the future and my favorite IRC client.
  • slack-termstars5.8k - Slack client for your terminal.
  • Slackadaisicalstars262 - Simple Slack client for the CLI.
  • weechat - Fast, light and extensible chat client.

⬆ back to top

Other

Community

Join the CLI lover community.

  • /r/commandline - This is for anything regarding the command line, in any operating system.
  • /r/osxterminal - Tips for using terminal.app in macOS.
  • /r/zsh/ - Everything on zsh.
  • /r/unixporn/ - Everything on unix.
  • #bash - Bash IRC channel on freenode.
  • Stack Overflow - Terminal tagged questions.

Other Sexy Lists

Here are some more sexy lists.

Awesome

  • awesome-devenvstars2.1k - Curated list of delightful Bash scripts and resources.
  • awesome-emacsstars6.5k - Community driven list of useful Emacs packages, libraries and others.
  • awesome-sysadminstars21.3k - Curated list of amazingly awesome open source sysadmin resources.
  • awesome-zsh-pluginsstars9.4k - Collection of ZSH frameworks, plugins & themes inspired by the various awesome list collections out there.

Misc

  • bash-guidestars10.3k - Guide to learn bash.
  • the-art-of-command-linestars88.7k - Master the command line, in one page.

⬆ back to top

Contributing

Your contributions are always welcome! Please take a look at our contribution guidelines and code of conduct first.

Pull requests might be kept open if it hasn't been decided whether additions are sexy enough.
